title: apt/dpkg refuses: 'Could not get lock /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend'
description_md:
Every `apt`/`dpkg` command on this box refuses with `Could not get lock /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend. It is held by process <pid>`. A maintenance script from earlier apparently never finished cleanly. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), confirm whether that process is actually still doing real work or just hung, and clear the lock safely.

You're done when dpkg's frontend lock is actually free again.
